description: Translate selections, notes, Markdown documents, images, and speech with AI and machine translation providers. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Selection Translator

releases.author: TlmKira
releases.description: 最低 Obsidian 版本提升到 1.7.2，以匹配对照阅读器使用的 Obsidian API。

releases.author: TlmKira
releases.description: 改进文档翻译缓存与现有译文复用，优化对照阅读体验、标记语法保护和用户可见文案。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changelog

## 1.0.1

- Renamed the vault file lookup helper to avoid Obsidian API compatibility false positives in community review.
- Rebuilt release artifacts with GitHub artifact attestations.

## 1.0.0

Initial release.

- Added selection, current paragraph, quick panel, and insert-below translation workflows.
- Added AI and official machine translation provider configuration.
- Added prompt presets for AI translation.
- Added immersive bilingual reading and side-by-side Markdown document translation.
- Added local translation cache, request queue limits, and runtime dashboard metrics.
- Added image translation actions for embedded Markdown images.
- Added TTS settings and floating result panel speech playback.
- Added interface languages: Simplified Chinese, English, German, and Japanese.
- Added privacy disclosure in the settings About tab and README.
